findings.title: Over-entanglement pattern
findings.message: Dense two-qubit connectivity may indicate anomalous or excessive entanglement

evidence.security_risk: Hallucinated or inefficient structures may introduce incorrect or insecure behavior

mitigation: Review the circuit manually for redundant, oscillating, or low-value gate patterns.
Reject non-standard or hallucinated APIs unless confirmed in official SDK documentation.
Run circuit simplification and compare the simplified circuit against the original intent.
Use benchmark prompts, retrieval grounding, or template-based generation to reduce LLM anomalies.

findings.title: Noise-induced divergence

evidence.security_risk: Execution under noisy conditions deviates from ideal behavior and may affect integrity or availability

mitigation: Treat the circuit as execution-sensitive and test it under realistic noise conditions before deployment.
Reduce circuit depth and two-qubit gate count to improve resilience.
Compare ideal and noisy distributions across multiple seeds or runs before accepting results.
Prefer backend-aware compilation and calibration-aligned execution settings where available.
